title: fagara olitoria
intro: Fagara olitoria, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a flowering plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its small, white flowers and edible, spicy fruits. Traditionally, Fagara olitoria has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to warm the body, dispel cold, and relieve pain. The health benefits of Fagara olitoria include its potential to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Fagara olitoria is often prepared as a powder, capsule, or tea, and is also used in traditional Chinese cooking to add flavor and heat to various dishes.
